feature: Fix remaining dark mode failures in meal-plan-config.tsx — direct replacements

prompts.description: Replace all hardcoded color classes in meal-plan-config.tsx with semantic equivalents
prompts.prompt:
In components/meal-plan-config.tsx, make exactly these replacements and nothing else. Use direct class substitution — do NOT add classes alongside the old ones, replace them outright.

1. Daily Target card container (line ~106):
   Find:    `rounded-[22px] border border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] p-4`
   Replace: `rounded-[22px] border border-border bg-card p-4`

2. "Daily target" label text (line ~109):
   Find:    `text-[#7a5b41]`
   Replace: `text-muted-foreground`
   (The full class string is `text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[#7a5b41]` — only swap the color token.)

3. Hero badge (line ~95):
   Find:    `hero-badge bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]`
   Replace: `hero-badge bg-secondary text-muted-foreground`

4. Accent dot (line ~152):
   Find:    `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]`
   Replace: `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground`

5. Meal rhythm card ternary — selected state (line ~173):
   Find:    `border-primary bg-[#edf4ec] shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`
   Replace: `border-primary bg-primary/15 shadow-[0_16px_30px_-28px_rgba(38,96,63,0.45)]`

6. Meal rhythm card ternary — idle hover state (line ~174):
   Find:    `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]`
   Replace: `border-border bg-card hover:border-primary/35 hover:bg-secondary`

Note: the large calorie number (line ~112) already uses `text-foreground` and the meal count number (line ~177) also already uses `text-foreground` — do not touch those lines.

Do not change any other classes, spacing, shadows, logic, or files. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
